heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly to partly cloudy. Scattered snow showers north, numerous over high terrain, with another 1 to 3 inches there. Lows in the teens north, and low to mid 20s in the south. West to northwest 5 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph early.

heading: Sunday
text: Increasing clouds. Chance of snow or valley rain showers in the north, mainly in New York. Highs from the mid 30s to around 40, some lower 30s far north. Winds becoming south 5 to 15 mph.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Chance of mainly rain showers; some freezing rain possible east of the Greens, and in far northern New York. Lows from the mid 30s to around 40, some lower 30s east of the Greens and in far northern New York; temperatures rising late. Winds becoming south to southeast and gusting to 30 mph, except gusting to 45 mph in the Champlain Valley, and to 60 mph in the watch area.
